instruction: The Paris ops work already has a few pieces moving. Please check the board, the calendar, and the recurring daily check, finish what's still missing, close out the open work, send team@example.com a recap, and leave the existing setup alone.
canonical_instruction: Some of the Paris ops work is already in motion. Please check what's on the board, what's on the calendar, and the recurring daily check, finish the missing pieces, close out the open work, send team@example.com a recap, and don't recreate anything that's already in place.
instruction_variants: Some of the Paris ops work is already in motion. Check what's on the board, what's on the calendar, and the recurring daily check, finish the missing pieces, close out the open work, send team@example.com a recap, and don't recreate anything that's already in place.

hidden_constraints.value: I checked the existing Paris ops setup, added the missing review, and left the existing task and daily check in place.

initial_state_overrides.ops/ops-resume-notes.txt: Paris partial ops notes already captured.

solution_commands: email send --to team@example.com --subject 'Paris ops resume recap' --body 'I checked the existing Paris ops setup, added the missing review, and left the existing task and daily check in place.'
